title: StoryOutput
description: The output of DATAGLOW's Story Engine: a plain-English data narrative plus the per-claim confidence scoring that backs every quantitative statement. Mirrors the result of generateStory() combined with buildStoryClaims() in js/story.js.

protocolVersion.description: Semver of the DATAGLOW protocol this payload targets.

text.description: The narrative. May contain inline HTML (confidence badges) when produced by the offline rule-based engine.

source.description: Which engine produced the narrative. "local" = offline rule-based; "local-fallback" = a model call failed and the rule-based engine was used instead.

error.description: Present only when source is "local-fallback": the model error that triggered the fallback.

claims.description: Individual quantitative claims extracted from the narrative, each independently confidence-scored.

kind.description: Which kind of quantitative claim this is.

column.description: Column the claim concerns, or null (e.g. for row counts).
